description_long: This is a tall, modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a sleek, contemporary facade. The exterior features a combination of white and gray surfaces, with extensive vertical and horizontal window arrangements that provide ample natural light to the interior. The lower levels include a rounded corner section with large glass panels, likely serving as a lobby or commercial space. Several balconies are visible, particularly on the upper floors, adding outdoor living space for residents. The rooftop is flat and appears to have mechanical or utility structures, typical of high-rise residential buildings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and a mix of solid and transparent materials.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with a white and gray facade, large windows, and multiple balconies. The structure features a rounded glass corner at the base and a flat rooftop.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with a prominent rounded glass corner at the lower left and a grid of windows and balconies running vertically.
description_view_1: The rear side is visible, showing a more uniform window arrangement and fewer balconies, with a flat white surface dominating the design.
description_view_2: This angle displays the opposite side of the main facade, with a similar window grid and the rounded glass section now on the right.
description_view_3: This view shows the side with the rounded glass corner more prominently, as well as a large section of white wall and a few balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with vertical and horizontal alignment, providing a symmetrical and modern appearance. Some sections feature grouped windows and integrated balconies, especially on the main facade.
